glosses.it: posto di apprendistato; posizione di apprendistato

glosses.yue: 學徒職位; 學徒空缺

sentences.target: Ich suche gerade eine Lehrstelle im Handwerk.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzuːxə gəˈʁaːdə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈleːɐ̯ʃtɛlə ɪm ˈhantvɛʁk/

translations.de: Ich suche gerade eine Lehrstelle im Handwerk.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzuːxə gəˈʁaːdə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈleːɐ̯ʃtɛlə ɪm ˈhantvɛʁk/
translations.en: I'm currently looking for an apprenticeship in a trade.
translations.es: Ahora estoy buscando una vacante de aprendiz en un oficio.
translations.fr: Je cherche actuellement un apprentissage dans l’artisanat.
translations.ko: 지금 기술직 견습 자리를 알아보고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在找一份技工学徒岗位。
translations.yue: 我而家搵緊一份技工學徒位。
translations.ru: Я сейчас ищу место ученика в сфере ремесел.
translations.pt: Estou procurando uma vaga de aprendiz no artesanato.
translations.he: אני מחפש עכשיו מקום להתלמדות בענף המלאכה.
translations.tr: Şu anda bir zanaatte çıraklık arıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một vị trí học việc trong ngành nghề thủ công.
translations.ar: أنا أبحث حالياً عن تدريب مهني في مجال الحرف.
translations.nl: Ik ben nu op zoek naar een leerplek in de ambachtelijke sector.
translations.uk: Я зараз шукаю учнівство у сфері ремесел.
translations.hu: Most éppen tanulóhelyet keresek egy kézműves szakmában.
translations.hi: मैं अभी किसी कारीगरी में शिक्षुता ढूँढ रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Szukam teraz nauki zawodu w rzemiośle.
translations.el: Ψάχνω τώρα μια θέση μαθητείας σε βιοτεχνία.
translations.nb: Jeg ser nå etter en læreplass i håndverk.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari magang di bidang kerajinan.
translations.sv: Jag letar just nu efter en lärlingsplats inom hantverk.
translations.ro: Caut acum o ucenicie în domeniul meșteșugurilor.
translations.cs: Zrovna hledám učňovské místo v řemesle.
translations.da: Jeg leder lige nu efter en læreplads i håndværk.
translations.ja: 今、職人の見習い先を探しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects the direct object 'eine Lehrstelle'.
Temporal adverb indicating the action is ongoing 'right now'.
Indefinite article; feminine accusative singular agreeing with 'Lehrstelle'.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object (what is being sought).
Contraction of 'in dem' (ADP + DET); introduces a prepositional phrase (locative domain/field).
Common noun; neuter dative singular governed by 'in'; head of the PP indicating the field/sector.

sentences.target: Sie hat endlich eine Lehrstelle gefunden.

translations.de: Sie hat endlich eine Lehrstelle gefunden.
translations.en: She finally found an apprenticeship position.
translations.es: Ella por fin consiguió una vacante de aprendiz.
translations.fr: Elle a enfin trouvé un apprentissage.
translations.zh-Hans: 她终于找到了一份学徒岗位。
translations.pt: Ela finalmente conseguiu uma vaga de aprendiz.
translations.he: היא סוף סוף מצאה מקום להתלמדות.
translations.vi: Cô ấy cuối cùng cũng tìm được một vị trí học việc.
translations.nl: Ze heeft eindelijk een leerplek gevonden.
translations.hi: उसे आखिरकार एक शिक्षुता मिल गई.
translations.pl: Ona w końcu znalazła naukę zawodu.
translations.nb: Hun har endelig fått en læreplass.
translations.sv: Hon har äntligen fått en lärlingsplats.
translations.ro: Ea a găsit în sfârșit o ucenicie.
translations.da: Hun har endelig fundet en læreplads.
translations.ja: 彼女はついに見習い先を見つけました。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the sentence.
Auxiliary verb, 3rd person singular present; forms the present perfect with the past participle.
Adverb expressing eventuality/relief; modifies the verb phrase.
Indefinite article; feminine accusative singular agreeing with 'Lehrstelle'.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object within the verb phrase.
Past participle of the lexical verb; combines with 'hat' to form the present perfect.

translations.es: Mi formación como aprendiz empieza en agosto.
translations.it: Il mio apprendistato inizia ad agosto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的学徒期在八月开始。
translations.yue: 我嘅學徒期喺八月開始。
translations.vi: Học việc của tôi bắt đầu vào tháng Tám.
translations.hi: मेरी शिक्षुता अगस्त में शुरू होती है.
translations.pl: Moja nauka zawodu zaczyna się w sierpniu.
translations.el: Η μαθητεία μου ξεκινά τον Αύγουστο.
translations.id: Magang saya mulai pada bulan Agustus.
translations.cs: Moje učňovské místo začíná v srpnu.
translations.ja: 私の見習いは8月に始まります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; 1st person singular, feminine nominative singular; modifies 'Lehrstelle'.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicate of the clause.
Contraction of 'in dem' (ADP + DET); introduces a temporal prepositional phrase.
Proper noun (month name); masculine dative singular governed by 'in'; head of the temporal PP.

sentences.target: Er bewirbt sich heute auf eine Lehrstelle.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ bəˈvɪʁpt zɪç ˈhɔʏ̯tə aʊ̯f ˈaɪ̯nə ˈleːɐ̯ʃtɛlə/

translations.de: Er bewirbt sich heute auf eine Lehrstelle.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ bəˈvɪʁpt zɪç ˈhɔʏ̯tə aʊ̯f ˈaɪ̯nə ˈleːɐ̯ʃtɛlə/
translations.en: He's applying for an apprenticeship today.
translations.es: Hoy está solicitando una vacante de aprendiz.
translations.fr: Il postule aujourd’hui pour un apprentissage.
translations.it: Oggi fa domanda per un apprendistato.
translations.ru: Он сегодня подаёт заявку на ученичество.
translations.pt: Ele está se candidatando hoje a uma vaga de aprendiz.
translations.vi: Hôm nay anh ấy nộp đơn xin học việc.
translations.nl: Hij solliciteert vandaag op een leerplek.
translations.uk: Він сьогодні подає заявку на учнівство.
translations.hi: वह आज शिक्षुता के लिए आवेदन कर रहा है.
translations.pl: On dziś składa podanie o naukę zawodu.
translations.el: Σήμερα κάνει αίτηση για μια θέση μαθητείας.
translations.nb: Han søker på en læreplass i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi el aplică pentru o ucenicie.
translations.cs: Dnes podává přihlášku na učňovské místo.
translations.da: Han søger en læreplads i dag.
translations.ja: 彼は今日、見習いに応募します。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular personal pronoun in nominative case; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a reflexive pronoun and a prepositional complement.
Reflexive pronoun, 3rd person singular accusative; required by the reflexive verb 'sich bewerben'.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the action.
Preposition governing accusative with 'sich bewerben'; marks the target of the application.
Indefinite article; feminine accusative singular agreeing with 'Lehrstelle'.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'auf' (application target).
